title: Iron Biplane Engines
description: A set of additional engines for Immersive Aircraft with Blatium support in mind.
body:
[![Image](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=&message=CurseForge&color=ECEBE6&labelColor=2F4858&style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&logoColor=white)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/iron-biplane-engines)
[![Image](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=&message=Modrinth&color=ECEBE6&labelColor=2F4858&style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=green)](https://modrinth.com/mod/iron-biplane-engines)


### An addon for [Immersive Aircraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-aircraft) which adds 5 engines (+2 if loaded [Blatium](https://modrinth.com/mod/blatium)).
```

```
### Content
![copper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9nghzNKK/images/89dcb1167546f413a031ceaa3ba29c6f6546c950.png)
![iron](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9nghzNKK/images/7bcd108cff73df6b3a426cf94d46ec18ea01d55c.png)

![golden](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9nghzNKK/images/1e91c92458b7be275ca24c3aa24e755d41513735.png)
![diamond](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9nghzNKK/images/cf8653487abe34500c8bd13eebfb99734592190a.png)

![netherite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9nghzNKK/images/90ea537bfea512ad2900f45a1ea2f0a83ba9995c.png)
![blatium](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9nghzNKK/images/e1c233bed20effae6bcff37ad84e83589fb8ea92.png)

![nlium](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9nghzNKK/images/ba2bb36be13cdbc31baedb410d5a43e4b594bcc3.png)


<details>
<summary>Image Text</summary>

- Copper Engine -> +20 Engine Power and +10 Fuel Requirement
- Iron Engine -> +40 Engine Power and +20 Fuel Requirement
- Gold Engine -> +60 Engine Power and +30 Fuel Requirement
- Diamond Engine -> +80 Engine Power and +40 Fuel Requirement
- Netherite Engine -> +100 Engine Power and +50 Fuel Requirement
- Blatium Engine -> +150 Engine Power and +50 Fuel Requirement
- Nlium Engine -> +200 Engine Power

</details>


https://blatfan.carrd.co/
